summary: A tune-in promo for National Geographic's reality series 'To Catch a Smuggler' (branded NatGeo and Hulu), mixing bold yellow text cards ('DON'T DO IT', 'WHEN YOU'RE CAUGHT') with quick clips of HSI agents at an airport and a nighttime raid, over captioned agent dialogue. It is a third-party broadcast/streaming TV-show promo rather than an agency-produced youth-appeal genre piece, so it is out of scope as a TV clip.
notable_text: TO CATCH A SMUGGLER / hulu / DON'T DO IT / WHEN YOU'RE CAUGHT / "We wear many hats." / "That's at the front door with your hands up." / "Running out the back."
